rubric.character_compliance: 0-2: final Title is within the applicable limit and Item Highlights is within 125 characters
rubric.anti_misbuy_attribute_retention: 0-2: purchase-critical identity, variation, fitment, count, size, or safety facts are retained
rubric.keyword_tradeoffs: 0-2: the exact core term and defensible high-intent terms outrank broad synonyms
rubric.claim_evidence: 0-2: unsupported claims are removed or flagged and verified claims stay within their evidence boundary
rubric.field_migration: 0-2: useful secondary facts are moved to the right field and promotional or duplicate content is deleted
